articles.author: Holly Ellyatt
articles.title: European stocks to open lower as UAE OPEC exit complicates oil supply outlook - CNBC
articles.description: European stocks opened broadly lower on Wednesday as investors react to the latest upset for OPEC and renewed concerns over the AI sector.
articles.content: LONDON European stocks traded broadly lower on Wednesday as investors monitored another flurry of corporate earnings reports and weighed the United Arab Emirates' shock exit from the OPEC oil cartel.… [+2565 chars]
